narrative: Bulk carrier 50,000 DWT. DOC valid until 2027, SMC valid until 2028. DPA designated and contactable. Lifeboats overhauled 2025 (5-year load test). EPIRB tested monthly, battery within service life. ECDIS charts up to date. ORB (oil record book) entries match operational events, no gaps. Garbage record book complete. Ballast water treatment system operational + BWRB current. All STCW certificates valid + flag endorsed. MLC 2006 work-rest compliant for last 90 days. SOPEP onboard + approved. SSAS tested last quarter.
